title: SAH Project "No Falame&Smoke"
body:
No Flame & Smoke 🔥🚭 Tired of constant fire and smoke particles in Minecraft? This lightweight mod gives you full control over the visual effects of torches, redstone torches, soul torches, candles, and other light sources. 👉 In a simple Mod Menu configuration screen, you can toggle flames and smoke: globally (for all blocks at once), or individually (per torch or candle). Changes apply immediately in-game, no restart required. By default the game behaves exactly like vanilla – you decide what to disable. Why? Minecraft is beautiful, but particles can sometimes be distracting – especially when working on large builds or using photorealistic PBR resource packs. This mod was created as a companion to my SAH Project Resource Pack (available on Patreon ), but it works perfectly well in vanilla too. Features ✔ Disable fire and smoke for torches, redstone torches, soul torches, and candles. ✔ Global toggles “disable all flame/smoke.” ✔ “Restore vanilla” button – one click resets everything to default. ✔ Mod Menu support (GUI instead of editing configs). ✔ Blocks not present in your version appear greyed out in the menu.


💛 Thank you for supporting SAH Project
